styles.container: max-width: 840px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 28px 32px; font-family: 'Times New Roman', Georgia, serif; color: #111111; line-height: 1.75; background: #fffef8; border: 1px solid #d6d0bf;
styles.title: margin: 0 0 22px; font-size: 42px; line-height: 1.05; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #111111;
styles.lead: margin: 0 0 18px; font-size: 21px; color: #202020; font-style: italic; text-indent: 0;
styles.image: display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; border: 1px solid #c7c0ac;
styles.row_wrapper: margin: 24px 0; display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: stretch;
styles.row_image: display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; border: 1px solid #c7c0ac;
styles.float_left: float: left; width: 40%; max-width: 320px; margin: 8px 18px 10px 0; display: block; border: 1px solid #c7c0ac;
styles.float_right: float: right; width: 40%; max-width: 320px; margin: 8px 0 10px 18px; display: block; border: 1px solid #c7c0ac;
